      Noise Control Active Noise Cancellation

      About this item

      • Noise Canceling & Hi-Res Sound - Featuring powerful 40mm dynamic drivers, Wentronic Y01 headphones combine advanced active noise canceling technology with high-fidelity sound. They effectively block unwanted background noise while delivering crystal-clear audio with deep bass and detailed highs—offering an immersive listening experience whether you’re relaxing, commuting, or traveling.
      • Multipoint Connection & Clear Hands-Free Calls - Equipped with the latest Bluetooth 5.3 technology, Wentronic Y01 ensures a faster, more stable connection with lower latency and extended range. The multipoint connection feature allows the bluetooth headphones to connect with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously and switch between them easily. The built-in microphone delivers crystal-clear voice quality for effortless hands-free calls and online meetings.
      • All-Day Comfort & Foldable Design - Crafted for extended wear, these over-ear headphones feature ultra-soft protein leather earcups with memory foam cushioning that gently conform to your ears. The adjustable headband and 90° rotating earcups ensure a customized fit, while the foldable design allows for convenient storage and portability—perfect for trips, work, or everyday use.
      • Up to 48 Hours Playtime & Dual Modes - Enjoy up to 48 hours of continuous playtime on a single charge. When the battery runs low, simply plug in the included 3.5mm audio cable to switch seamlessly from wireless to wired mode—ensuring your music never stops, even on long journeys.
      • Package Includes - The box contains one Wentronic Y01 foldable ANC headphone, a 3.5mm audio cable, a charging cable, and a user manual—everything you need for a seamless listening experience right out of the box.
      › See more product details

          How customer reviews and ratings work

          Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

          To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

          Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

          Sponsored

          Customers say

          Customers find these headphones offer excellent sound quality with crisp highs, and appreciate their comfortable fit that sits well on the head. Moreover, the Bluetooth connectivity is easy to set up and maintain, with one customer noting it stays stable without dropouts. Additionally, customers praise the headphones' good build quality, long-lasting battery life, and value for money. However, the noise cancellation feature receives mixed reviews, with some finding it perfect while others say it's not great.

          "Comfortable and doesn’t make a loud noise when you turn them on or connect them, the only issues the headband doesn’t really have cushioning, but..." Read more
          "They are very comfortable, it is hard to find headphones to fit comfortably with piercing but the sound could be better and they are a little sound..." Read more
          "I have had these for quite a few months and really love them! Comfortable to wear, light weight, great sound...." Read more
          "Very nice! It’s very nice for what it’s worth. Super comfy the Bluetooth connectivity was great 10/10! Definitely recommend I got the starfire color" Read more
          29 customers mention value for money, 27 positive, 2 negative29 customers mention "Value for money"27 positive2 negative
          Customers find these headphones offer excellent value for money, providing good sound quality relative to their price point.
          "...Microphone for phone calls is not good quality either. Great for the price, but know that you're not getting something fancy." Read more
          "...So far, a great value !" Read more
          "...It's good for the price! I'll probably update this review maybe in a year or so about battery... if I remember to." Read more
          "...100% would say Value for money !..." Read more

          Customers praise the headphones' Bluetooth connectivity, finding it easy to set up and maintain, with one customer noting it stays stable without dropouts.
          "...They have held up well and she says the sound quality is very good. Easy to pair but comes with a cord if you want to use it. Overall very satisfied." Read more
          "...They connect quickly via Bluetooth and have a strong, stable connection...." Read more
          "...Pairing was quick and easy, and the Bluetooth connection is strong with no dropouts...." Read more
          "...The Bluetooth connection is solid—quick to pair and stays connected without any dropouts...." Read more

          Amazon Customer
          5 out of 5 stars
          Amazing wireless headphones
          After using these wireless headphones I have to say I’m obsessed! The sound quality is simply fantastic, listening to music or watching movies feels immersive with enhanced sound. It’s noise cancellation is impressive, you can focus on your audio without being interrupted by the background noise. They are extremely comfortable the ear pads are super soft so your ears never hurt and the adjustable head band provides a custom fit. Its Bluetooth connection is stable and easy to pair… i’ve had no issues with the audio even when moving around. Additionally, the battery life is a major win they last so long on a single charge. Lastly, they also have a foldable design which makes them super easy to throw in a bag without taking up space. These headphones are in a excellent blend of quality, comforts, and functionality. I highly recommend this to anyone looking for a premium auto experience at a great price.

          • joshua hariis
            5.0 out of 5 stars very loud
            Reviewed in the United States on December 3, 2025
            Color: BlueVerified Purchase
            I’ve been using these wireless noise-canceling headphones for a bit now, and I’m really impressed with how well they balance comfort, sound quality, and battery life. The audio is crisp with surprisingly deep bass, and the noise canceling does a solid job of blocking everyday background sounds without feeling overwhelming. I love that they’re lightweight and foldable, which makes them easy to carry, and the earpads stay comfortable even after long listening sessions. The Bluetooth connection has been stable across my devices, and the battery truly lasts a long time—I can go several days without needing to recharge. For the price, they’ve turned out to be a great everyday pair of headphones.

          • OnlyBadasstxmama
            5.0 out of 5 stars Amazing Sound, Comfortable Fit, and Great Battery Life
            Reviewed in the United States on August 8, 2025
            Color: StarlightVerified Purchase
            I’ve been using these wireless over-the-ear headphones for a couple of weeks now, and they’ve exceeded my expectations in almost every way. The sound quality is rich and balanced, with deep bass, clear mids, and crisp highs. Whether I’m listening to music, watching movies, or taking calls, the audio is consistently great.

            The over-ear design is super comfortable—even during long listening sessions. The ear cushions are soft and breathable, and the headband doesn’t feel too tight or heavy. I’ve worn them for hours while working from home and during flights without any discomfort.

            Pairing was quick and easy, and the Bluetooth connection is strong with no dropouts. I was also impressed by the battery life—I’ve gone several days without needing a recharge, even with regular use. The quick-charge feature is a nice bonus when you're in a rush.

            Noise isolation is solid (even without active noise canceling), and the built-in mic works well for Zoom calls and phone conversations. Plus, they fold up nicely for travel and come with a compact carrying case.

            If you're looking for affordable, high-quality wireless headphones with great comfort and performance, these are a fantastic choice.
            Read more

                I always wanted a pair of Air pods, but I can’t afford $500 , but I could and afford these Y01, which looks so similar to the famous Air pods. Now for the perks:
                Bluetooth, noise canceling, there is an app to use with the Y01, if you wish to enhance the sound quality. Battery life last for me for 3 days tops.               • Greg B
                4.0 out of 5 stars Solid headphones - especially for price. Honestly worth it! Definitely a nice little Apple dupe
                Reviewed in the United States on August 11, 2025
                Color: StarlightVerified Purchase
                I really like these headphones. The active noise cancelling feature is ~95% solid. I can’t hear anything else if I’m listening to music. But I can hear some things if I’m listening to something with pauses (like a podcast). If you’re wanting 100000% cancellation all the time, these headphones may not be for you. But I am still very satisfied with these headphones’ noise cancellation - especially given the price. They’re super cute, and the ear pads are SO SOFT! I can hear calls with 100% clarity, but a person who I’m speaking to on the phone may say that they can hear me but I sound slightly muffled.
                Read more

              Product Summary: Wentronic Y01 Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones Bluetooth 5.3 Over Ear Headphones with Microphone, Hi-Res Audio, 48H Playtime, Foldable Comfortable Earpads,Compatible with iOS,Android,PC, Starlight

              From Wentronic

              4.4 out of 5 stars, 460 ratings

              Customer reviews

              1K+ bought in past month

              Price

              One-time purchase: THB 1,313.63

              Purchasing options

              Other sellers

              Other sellers

              About this Item

              • Noise Canceling & Hi-Res Sound - Featuring powerful 40mm dynamic drivers, Wentronic Y01 headphones combine advanced active noise canceling technology with high-fidelity sound. They effectively block unwanted background noise while delivering crystal-clear audio with deep bass and detailed highs—offering an immersive listening experience whether you’re relaxing, commuting, or traveling.
              • Multipoint Connection & Clear Hands-Free Calls - Equipped with the latest Bluetooth 5.3 technology, Wentronic Y01 ensures a faster, more stable connection with lower latency and extended range. The multipoint connection feature allows the bluetooth headphones to connect with two Bluetooth devices simultaneously and switch between them easily. The built-in microphone delivers crystal-clear voice quality for effortless hands-free calls and online meetings.
              • All-Day Comfort & Foldable Design - Crafted for extended wear, these over-ear headphones feature ultra-soft protein leather earcups with memory foam cushioning that gently conform to your ears. The adjustable headband and 90° rotating earcups ensure a customized fit, while the foldable design allows for convenient storage and portability—perfect for trips, work, or everyday use.
              • Up to 48 Hours Playtime & Dual Modes - Enjoy up to 48 hours of continuous playtime on a single charge. When the battery runs low, simply plug in the included 3.5mm audio cable to switch seamlessly from wireless to wired mode—ensuring your music never stops, even on long journeys.
              • Package Includes - The box contains one Wentronic Y01 foldable ANC headphone, a 3.5mm audio cable, a charging cable, and a user manual—everything you need for a seamless listening experience right out of the box.

              Product Description

              Active Noise Canceling Headphones Bluetooth Over Ear Headphones with Microphone, Hi-Res Audio, Foldable Design, Multipoint Connection, Comfortable Earpads, Compatible with iOS Android PC
